name: BEN_CTFN_DOC_MAP
description: BEN_CTFN_DOC_MAP is a mapping table between certification type and Document Type. This mapping is allowed at two levels(Program or PNIP)

columns.Name: CTFN_DOC_MAP_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column

columns.Name: MAPPING_TABLE_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the table for which the document setup has been done

columns.Name: MAPPING_COLUMN_NAME
columns.Comments: Mapping Table Column Name

columns.Name: MAPPING_TABLE_PK_ID
columns.Comments: Mapping table primary key id

columns.Name: CTFN_TYPE_CD
columns.Comments: The certification type

columns.Name: VALIDITY_CD
columns.Comments: Code which determines the validity time of the document

columns.Name: VALIDITY_TM_NUM
columns.Comments: This determines the time period for which the document will be valid. This will be blank when the Validity_cd is 'Lifetime'

columns.Name: APPROVAL_PERD_CD
columns.Comments: Code which determines the time for which the approval is valid

columns.Name: APPROVAL_PERD_TM_NUM
columns.Comments: This determines the time period for which the approval will be valid.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to hr_document_types_b

columns.Name: VERIFICATION_MODE
columns.Comments: This specifies whether a manual approval from admin is needed or the document will be auto approved

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start Date

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End Date

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Active FLag

columns.Name: DOC_USG_CD
columns.Comments: This value differentiates whether the row was created as part of Certification Process or as part of Record Life Event

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Comments: Template ID field for future use.
